title: Key Fact Statement
disbursementClause: If it is stage wise mention the clause of loan agreement having relevant details
repaymentNote: EMI amount is payable as per due date specified in monthly Statement
interestRateType: Interest rate p.a.(%) and type(Fixed or floating or hybrid)
floatingInterestInfo: Additional information in case of floating rate of interest
benchmarkImpact: Impact of change in the reference benchmark
payableToThirdParty: Payable to a third party through RE(B)
amountOrPercent: Amount (in Rs) or percentage (%) as applicable
contingentCharges: Details of contingent charges (in Rs or %, as applicable)
penalCharges: Penal Charges, if any, in case of delayed payment
paymentReturnFees: Payment Return fees: 2% of the payment amount (min ₹450 - max ₹4999)
foreclosure: 3% of principal outstanding + GST & Pro-rata interest
foreclosureGST: 3% of principal outstanding + GST & Pro-rata interest
switchCharges: Charges for switching of loans from floating to fixed rate and vice versa
totalInterest: Total Interest charged during the entire tenure of the loan (In Rupees)
totalAmount: Total amount to be paid by the borrower (Sum of (2),8(i),11) (In Rupees)
row_1_left: Clause of Loan agreement relating to engagement of recovery agents
row_1_right: In the event of default, the details of authorized associate to approach for recovery of dues will be intimated to you through a payment reminder communication and any change in details would be intimated to you thereon. List of authorized associates empanelled for handling collections are updated on the bank’s website for reference.
row_2_left: Clause of Loan agreement which details grievance redressal mechanism
row_3_left: Phone number and email id of the nodal grievance redressal officer
row_3_right: Ms. Shalini Tondon (Grievance Redressal Officer) Grievance Redressal Cell, HDFC Bank Limited, 1st Floor, Empire Plaza-1, Lal Bahadur Shastri Marg, Chandan Nagar, Vikroli West, Mumbai-400083 Call: 18002664060 Email ID - grievance.redressaldl@hdfc.bank.in Monday to Saturday 9.30 am to 5.30 pm This facility is not available on 2nd and 4th Saturdays, all Sundays and Bank Holidays
row_4_left: Whether the loan is, or in future maybe, subject to transfer to other Res or securitisation (Yes/No)
row_5_left: In case of lending under collaborative lending arrangements (e.g. co-lending/outsourcing), following additional details may be furnished
row_5_originating_re: Name of the originating RE, along with its funding proportion
row_5_partner_re: Name of the partner RE along with its proportion of funding
row_6_left: In case of digital loans, following specific disclosures may be furnished:
row_6_i: (i) Cooling off/look-up period, in terms of RE’s board approved policy, during which borrower shall not be charged any penalty on prepayment of loan
row_6_ii: (ii) Details of LSP acting as recovery agent and authorized to approach the borrower
installment: Number of instalments for payment of principal, in case of non- equated periodic loans
capitalize: Number of instalments for payment of capitalised interest, if any
totalint: Total interest amount to be charged during the entire tenor of the loan as per the rate prevailing on sanction date (in Rupees)
payableThird: Payable to third-party routed through RE
totalAmt: Total amount to be paid by the borrower (sum of 1 and 5 and 6A) (in Rupees)
rate: Annual Percentage Rate- Effective annualised interest rate (in percentage)
disbursementSched: Schedule of disbursement as per terms and conditions
dueDate: Due date of payment of instalment and interest
note1: *GST is applicable on processing fees and charges.
note1GST: *GST is applicable on Interest and charges.
note2: *GST is not a part of the APR calculation.
note2GST: *GST is not added in the APR calculation.
note3: The first EMI amount will include gap interest and will thus differ from what is mentioned in the above KFS table.
currency: EMI amount is payable as per due date specified in monthly Statement
row_5_originating_re_insta: Name of the originating RE, along with its funding proportion
repaymentNoteGujarati: EMI amount is payable as per due date specified in monthly Statement
paymentReturnFeesPunjabi: Payment Return fees: 2% of the payment amount (min ₹450 - max ₹4999)
payableToThirdPartyKannadaJumbo: Payable to a third party through RE(B)
AmountOrPercent: Amount (in Rs) or percentage (%) as applicable
TotalAmount: Total amount to be paid by the borrower (Sum of (2),8(i),11) (In Rupees)
row_6_i_jumbo: (i) Cooling off/look-up period, in terms of RE’s board approved policy, during which borrower shall not be charged any penalty on prepayment of loan
